--type
options.description: The type of resource being exported

--where
options.description: Comma separated list of query filters

--save-path
options.description: Save command output to file and create missing path directories

--notify
options.description: Force system notification when export has finished

name: -b
--blind
options.description: Execute in blind mode without showing the progress monitor

--open
options.description: Open automatically the file after a successful export

--quiet
options.description: Execute command without showing warning messages

--keep
options.description: Keep original export files in temp dir
